test.name: Find a FastAPI REST endpoint

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Write Project File
kw.arg:
from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel

app = FastAPI()

class UserCreate(BaseModel):

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Checks that a basic FastAPI app is discovered as a REST backend.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.name: Report shows issue breakdown

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.arg: __import__("analyzer.report", fromlist=["AnalysisReport"]).AnalysisReport([__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["Issue","IssueLocation","IssueSeverity","IssueType"]).Issue(detector_name="demo", issue_type=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueType"]).IssueType.RELIABILITY, severity=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueSeverity"]).IssueSeverity.MEDIUM, title="missing validation", description="demo", location=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueLocation"]).IssueLocation("app.py", 10))]).to_dict()
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: Checks that the report dictionary includes the expected issue summary fields.

test.name: Report health score goes down when issues exist

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.arg: __import__("analyzer.report", fromlist=["AnalysisReport"]).AnalysisReport([__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["Issue","IssueLocation","IssueSeverity","IssueType"]).Issue(detector_name="demo", issue_type=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueType"]).IssueType.SECURITY, severity=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueSeverity"]).IssueSeverity.HIGH, title="security issue", description="demo", location=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueLocation"]).IssueLocation("app.py", 1)), __import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["Issue","IssueLocation","IssueSeverity","IssueType"]).Issue(detector_name="demo", issue_type=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueType"]).IssueType.PERFORMANCE, severity=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueSeverity"]).IssueSeverity.LOW, title="slow issue", description="demo", location=__import__("analyzer.issue", fromlist=["IssueLocation"]).IssueLocation("app.py", 2))]).health_score.to_dict()
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Checks that the health score decreases when security and performance issues exist.

kw.name: Run Functional Tests
kw.msg: Running 1 functional API tests from Functional Test Builder Functional test: health ok

test.name: Passes healthy GraphQL query

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${tests} = [{'name': 'graphql data present', 'kind': 'graphql', 'url': 'http://127.0.0.1:43137/graphql', 'query': 'query($id: ID!) { user(id: $id) { id name } }', 'variables': {'id': '1'}, 'expect': {'status': 2...
kw.arg: [{"name": "graphql data present", "kind": "graphql", "url": "${BASE_URL}/graphql", "query": "query($id: ID!) { user(id: $id) { id name } }", "variables": {"id": "1"}, "expect": {"status": 200, "data_not_null": True, "no_errors": True, "json_paths": {"data.user.name": "Ada"}}}]
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.arg: [{"name": "broken graphql response", "kind": "graphql", "url": "${BASE_URL}/graphql", "query": "query($id: ID!) { user(id: $id) { id name } }", "variables": {"id": "broken"}, "expect": {"status": 200, "data_not_null": True, "no_errors": True}}]

test.name: Find Spring controller validation and swallowed errors

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Analyze Java Code
kw.msg: ${issues} = [Issue(detector_name='java_backend_review', issue_type=<IssueType.RELIABILITY: 'reliability'>, severity=<IssueSeverity.MEDIUM: 'medium'>, title='Java API handler createUser() accepts input without obv...

test.doc: Checks that Spring controller validation gaps and swallowed exceptions are detected.

test.name: Find Quarkus N plus one pattern

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Analyze Java Code
kw.msg: ${issues} = [Issue(detector_name='java_backend_review', issue_type=<IssueType.PERFORMANCE: 'performance'>, severity=<IssueSeverity.MEDIUM: 'medium'>, title='Possible N+1 database access in listUsers()', descripti...

test.doc: Checks that a Quarkus loop with repeated data access is reported as an N+1 risk.

test.name: Find Java GraphQL query concatenation

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Running Java GraphQL injection detector case.
kw.arg: Running Java GraphQL injection detector case.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.arg: String query = "SELECT * FROM salary WHERE employee_id = '" + employeeId + "'";
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Analyze Java Code
kw.msg: ${issues} = [Issue(detector_name='java_backend_review', issue_type=<IssueType.SECURITY: 'security'>, severity=<IssueSeverity.HIGH: 'high'>, title='Query string concatenation in calculateSalary()', description='SQ...

test.doc: Checks that string concatenation inside a GraphQL query is flagged.

test.name: Find unsafe Python security issues

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.name: Do not flag safe Python security code

kw.name: Log

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.doc: Checks that safe Python code stays clean and does not create false positives.

kw.msg: ${issues} = [Issue(detector_name='data_flow_security', issue_type=<IssueType.SECURITY: 'security'>, severity=<IssueSeverity.HIGH: 'high'>, title='Database query using string formatting', description='User data mi...
